info.description:
`petstore` is an example command line interface designed to make working with the
[PetStore API](https://petstore3.swagger.io) easier. It provides a number of
capabilities, including:

- validating request parameters
- executing API requests
- parsing the API response
- handling API errors

The commands are documented below. You can also find out more about each
command using the contextual `--help` flag. e.g.:

```sh
petstore --help
```
info.summary: An example CLI Document describing operations a petstore CLI may provide.
info.title: PetStore CLI

install.description: A fake releases endpoint - no real release of this CLI exists
install.name: Binary Download

install.description: A fake go install - no real release of this CLI exists
install.name: Go Install

args.description:
A JSON formatted file with the exact POST body to send as part of the request to add a
new pet to the store using the PetStore API. The exact schema can be found
[here](https://petstore3.swagger.io/api/v3/openapi.json#/components/schemas/PetPet). You
can use this option instead of passing individual flags.
args.name: path-to-req-body
args.summary: The path to a JSON file containing the new pet payload

petstore pet add [flags].description: Create a new pet in the store using a JSON payload or explicit flags.

flags.description: Provide this flag multiple times to set multiple photo URLs.
flags.name: photoUrls
flags.summary: A list of photo URLs to display for the pet

flags.name: status
flags.summary: The pet status in the store

flags.description: Provide this flag multiple times to add multiple tags.
flags.name: tags
flags.summary: Tags to assign to the pet

petstore pet add [flags].summary: Add a new pet to the store

flags.name: id
flags.summary: The ID of the pet to delete

flags.name: api-key
flags.summary: API key header used to authorize the delete request

flags.name: status
flags.summary: The status to filter pets by

flags.description: Provide this flag multiple times to filter by multiple tags.
flags.name: tags
flags.summary: The tags to filter pets by

flags.name: id
flags.summary: The ID of the pet to retrieve

args.name: path-to-req-body
args.summary: The path to a JSON file containing the updated pet payload

petstore pet update [flags].description: Update a pet using a JSON payload or explicit flags.

flags.name: name
flags.summary: The updated name of the pet

flags.description: Provide this flag multiple times to set multiple photo URLs.
flags.name: photoUrls
flags.summary: A list of photo URLs to display for the pet

flags.description: Provide this flag multiple times to add multiple tags.
flags.name: tags
flags.summary: Tags to assign to the pet

flags.name: id
flags.summary: The ID of the pet to update

flags.name: name
flags.summary: The new name for the pet

flags.name: status
flags.summary: The new status for the pet

petstore pet update-form [flags].summary: Update a pet using form data

args.name: path-to-file
args.summary: The path to the file to upload

petstore pet upload-image <path-to-file>.description: Upload a binary image file for the specified pet.

flags.name: additionalMetadata
flags.summary: Additional metadata to store with the uploaded image

petstore pet upload-image <path-to-file>.summary: Upload an image for a pet

args.name: id
args.summary: The ID of the order to delete

flags.name: id
flags.summary: The ID of the order to retrieve

args.name: path-to-order-body
args.summary: The path to a JSON file containing the order payload

petstore store order place [flags].description: Create a purchase order using a JSON payload or explicit flags.

flags.name: pet-id
flags.summary: The ID of the pet to order

flags.name: complete
flags.summary: Whether the order has been completed

petstore store order place [flags].summary: Place an order for a pet

args.name: path-to-user-body
args.summary: The path to a JSON file containing the user payload

petstore user create <arguments> [flags].description: Create a new user using a JSON payload or explicit flags.

args.name: path-to-users-body
args.summary: The path to a JSON file containing the user list payload

petstore user create-with-list <argument.description: Create multiple users using a JSON array payload.
petstore user create-with-list <argument.summary: Create multiple users with a list

flags.name: username
flags.summary: The username of the user to delete

petstore user update [flags].description: Update a user's information using a JSON payload or explicit flags.

flags.name: username
flags.summary: The username of the user to update
